title: Seaskipper
description: A partially aquatic, vanilla-based origin that loves to live near the water. It has a slight learning curve, due to the skip timings to be a little harsh.
body:
### ⚓Overview 

*Partially aquatic, Seaskippers are nimble hunters that can jump across the surface of water.*

The Seaskipper origin is an impact 2 origin that has a unique way to move around. It can skip over large ponds. To water skip, simply press jump when you are less than one block above water. You can do this 20 times. It is directional. 

### 🌊Power List

- **Surface Skip**: You can skip along the surface of the water. However, this exhausts you.


- **Aquatic Hunter**: You are well fit for hunting underwater. 
  > *You naturally swim faster, see better underwater, and mine quicker while submerged!*


- **Lightweight**: Your bones are lightweight. You better be careful fighting!
  > *You have 2 less hearts and take more knockback.*



- **Pescatarian**: You can only eat fish!

## ✨Tricks & Tips

As the creator of Seaskipper, I know a bit about the origin. Here are a few tips and tricks you can use!

1. You can skip on waterlogged blocks!

2. You can only skip when you're less than a block above water.

3. If you angle your skips downwards, you can spam jump and go really fast! This does take up a lot of skips and food though..

## Pick this origin if you like to be agile and aquatic!
